summary: Frontend testing completed for Victory Lane PostCard redesign. All features working correctly - modern layout with avatar, username, timestamp inline, proper content indentation, and all interactive buttons functional.
critical_code_review_comments: PostCard.js is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
All interactive elements have appropriate hover states and visual feedback
Mobile responsive design works correctly at 375px viewport
seed_data_creation: None required - existing demo users used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Victory Lane PostCard redesign tested successfully. Key test scenarios covered: 1) Page loads at /victory-lane, 2) PostCard displays with modern layout (avatar 10x10 with ring, username/timestamp inline), 3) Content indented 52px under header, 4) All buttons clickable (like, comment, share, bookmark), 5) Login flow works with demo1/demo1, 6) Post creation works, 7) Mobile view (375px) displays correctly. All data-testid attributes present and working.

victory_lane_page_load.details: Page loads successfully at /victory-lane with 10 post cards visible

postcard_modern_layout.details: Avatar is 10x10 with ring-2 styling, username/timestamp inline in single row

content_indentation.details: Content properly indented with pl-[52px] class

like_button.details: Like button clickable, shows red active state (text-red-500, bg-red-50)

comment_button.details: Comment button expands/collapses comments section, shows 'No answers yet' or comment input

share_button.details: Share button clickable, shows green active state (text-green-600, bg-green-50)

bookmark_button.details: Bookmark button clickable, shows blue active state (text-blue-600, bg-blue-50)

tags_display.details: Tags display inline with username when present (data-testid='post-tag-{idx}')

login_flow.details: Demo login with demo1/demo1 works via /api/auth/demo-login endpoint

post_creation.details: Logged-in user can create new posts via post composer

mobile_view.details: Mobile view (375px viewport) displays correctly with responsive layout

follow_button.details: Follow button toggles between 'Follow' and 'Following' states

username_navigation.details: Clicking username navigates to user profile page
